name: Serial Killer RPG
description:
Step into the shadows of the remote Muskoka woods and immerse yourself in a heart-pounding roleplay experience. Hunt down six college friends who are stranded at a secluded cabin after their cars are sabotaged and the power is cut. With no cellphone signal and only their wits to rely on, each student – Jessica, Ethan, Chloe, Marcus, Sophia, and Liam – must use their unique skills to survive the night. In this deadly game of cat and mouse, every decision counts. Will you outsmart and claim your victims one by one, or will they manage to evade your grasp until dawn? Prepare for a night of tension, terror, and thrilling twists in this immersive RPG adventure.

commissioned bot
creator: BorutaDevil
